## Summary

A clear and short description of the bug.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to ...
2. Click on ...
3. Draw / move / sync ...
4. See error

## Expected behavior

What should have happened?

## Actual behavior

What happened instead?

## Environment

- OS:
- Browser:
- App version / commit:
- Sync mode:
  - [ ] local only
  - [ ] multi-tab
  - [ ] WebRTC room
  - [ ] WebSocket room

## Screenshots or recordings

Add screenshots, screen recordings, or logs if helpful.

## Additional context

Anything else that might help track this down.
